title: AFRM Stock Forecast and Price Targets
text: AFRM Stock Forecast Summary. Current Price: $65.82 (as of 5/15/2026). Consensus Price Target: $86.00 with Projected Upside: 30.66%. Price Range: $68.00 (low) to $110.00 (high). Analyst Consensus Rating: Moderate Buy with 29 total analyst ratings. 20 Buy ratings, 9 Hold ratings, 1 Strong Buy rating, 0 Sell ratings. Recent Rating Activity (Past 90 Days): 3 upgrades and 2 downgrades. Key Analyst Actions: The most recent upgrade came from Mizuho, where analyst Dan Dolev boosted the target from $95 to $100, representing 57.43% upside potential. Bank of America also raised its target to $88.00, while UBS increased its rating to $82.00. Comparison to Sector: Affirm's consensus rating (Moderate Buy) outperforms broader computer/technology sector ratings (Hold), with predicted upside significantly higher than the broader market's 17.88%.
